overview: Mono-Red Goblins is a fast-paced aggressive deck that relies on tribal synergy and mana acceleration to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize. By leveraging Legion Loyalist for early land drops and card advantage, the deck establishes a wide board of 1/1s quickly. Rundvelt Hordemaster and Goblin Warchief then multiply your combat damage, turning a swarm of goblins into an unstoppable offensive force in the Pioneer format.
win_conditions: Overwhelm the opponent with a wide board of low-cost goblins
Activate Goblin Warchief to pump attackers and close the game in combat
Use Legion Loyalist to accelerate mana and deploy threats ahead of curve

keep_criteria: Hands containing Legion Loyalist or Goblin Warchief
Hands with early land drops and aggressive creatures

early_game: Play lands and one-mana goblins to establish board presence
Use Legion Loyalist to fetch additional lands and accelerate
Apply early pressure to force opponent to use removal inefficiently
mid_game: Deploy Goblin Warchief to boost attack power and trigger combat tricks
Use Rundvelt Hordemaster to generate token goblins and widen the board
Push damage through while protecting key threats
late_game: Maintain board control with a wide army of goblins
Use token generation to trigger Warchief and Hordemaster repeatedly
Close out the game with overwhelming combat damage

key_cards.name: Legion Loyalist
key_cards.notes: Activate early to fetch lands, then use its draw ability to find win conditions like Warchief or Hordemaster.

key_cards.name: Rundvelt Hordemaster
key_cards.notes: Play when you have multiple goblins in hand to trigger its enter abilities, creating a wide board quickly.

key_cards.name: Goblin Warchief
key_cards.notes: Hold up mana to activate its ability before combat, boosting all goblins to close games or clear blockers.

sequencing_tips: Activate Legion Loyalist before playing other creatures to maximize land drops
Wait to play Goblin Warchief until you have multiple goblins ready to attack
Use Rundvelt Hordemaster's tokens to trigger Warchief's ability for maximum damage

matchups.advice: Race before they stabilize with sweepers or counterspells. Push damage early and use Warchief to bypass blockers.
Apply constant pressure to prevent them from playing their big threats. Use Hordemaster to generate value and outpace their curve.
Use Legion Loyalist to accelerate and match their speed. Prioritize wide boards over big pumps to survive combat trades.
